author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 13 APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS (FINAL DISPATCH). 4 BROKEN tests (#1059, #1060, #1061, #1062) strengthened: typed fn-pointer pins + real download_weights/load_pretrained invocations under --ignored (#1059/#1060), hand-computed minijinja EXPECTED_RENDERED string assertion (#1061), real Device::Mps(0) Display invocation through core enum + typed fn-pointer pins for MpsDevice::new/ordinal (#1062). Sabotage demo: helpful → helpfuL caught by assert_eq! at line 310. Follow-up #1089 filed for orthogonal pre-existing registry_list_models_count_matches_reference fixture drift (registry has 19 entries, fixture says 18). No src/ changes, no new workspace deps. Audit-fix series COMPLETE: 56/56 BROKEN tests closed.
